title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Himachal Pradesh Gramin Bank, Mandi
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated May 04, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹5 lakh (Rupees Five Lakh only) on Himachal Pradesh Gramin Bank, Mandi (the bank) for contravention of the provisions of Section 26A read with Section 51(1) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (BR Act) and non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Interest Rate on Deposits’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of
